categories.name: L402 / Machine Payments
categories.description: Make any API payable, discoverable, and consumable by people and agents.

repos.name: toll-booth
repos.description: Any API becomes a Lightning toll booth in one line. L402 middleware for Express, Hono, Deno, Bun, and Workers.

repos.name: 402-announce
repos.description: Announce HTTP 402 services on Nostr for decentralised discovery using kind 31402.

repos.name: 402-mcp
repos.description: MCP client for AI agents to discover, pay for, and consume L402 and x402 APIs.

repos.name: 402-pub
repos.description: Live directory for Lightning-paid APIs at 402.pub.

repos.name: toll-booth-announce
repos.description: Bridge between toll-booth and 402-announce so a toll-booth service can be announced on Nostr.

repos.name: toll-booth-dvm
repos.description: Expose any toll-booth-gated API as a NIP-90 Data Vending Machine on Nostr.

repos.name: toll-booth-mcp
repos.description: MCP server with read-only analytics and widget UIs for toll-booth deployments.

repos.name: 402-indexer
repos.description: Nostr-native crawler that discovers L402 and x402 paid APIs.

repos.name: aperture-phoenixd
repos.description: Use Phoenixd as the Lightning backend for Aperture, with no LND required.

repos.name: aperture-announce
repos.description: Announce Aperture L402 services on Nostr for decentralised discovery.

repos.name: payment-methods
repos.description: Lightning and Cashu payment method specs for HTTP Payment Authentication.

categories.name: Spatial / Meeting
categories.description: Geospatial tools and fair meeting-point discovery for distributed participants.

repos.name: geohash-kit
repos.description: Zero-dependency geohash toolkit.

repos.name: rendezvous-kit
repos.description: Find fair meeting points for N participants.

repos.name: rendezvous-mcp
repos.description: MCP server for AI-driven meeting-point discovery.

categories.name: Identity / Access
categories.description: Sovereign identity, verification, and encrypted access control for the open web.

repos.name: spoken-token
repos.description: TOTP, but you say it out loud.

repos.name: canary-kit
repos.description: Deepfake-proof identity verification with spoken words, duress detection, encrypted group sync.

repos.name: nsec-tree
repos.description: Deterministic Nostr sub-identity derivation.

repos.name: nsec-tree-cli
repos.description: Offline-first CLI for nsec-tree.

repos.name: signet
repos.description: Decentralised identity verification for Nostr. 4 tiers, ZKP age proofs, Signet IQ.

repos.name: dominion
repos.description: Encrypted access control with epoch-based key rotation.

categories.name: AI Agents
categories.description: Sovereign tools for AI agents operating on Nostr.

repos.name: bray
repos.description: Sovereign Nostr identity for AI agents. 106 tools across identity, social, payments, moderation, privacy.

categories.name: Trust / Privacy
categories.description: Privacy-preserving trust and attestation primitives for Nostr.

repos.name: nostr-veil
repos.description: Privacy-preserving Web of Trust with LSAG ring signatures over NIP-85.

repos.name: nostr-attestations
repos.description: One Nostr event kind for all attestations (NIP-VA, kind 31000).

categories.name: Cryptographic Primitives
categories.description: Low-level cryptographic building blocks for privacy and verifiability on secp256k1.

repos.name: ring-sig
repos.description: SAG and LSAG ring signatures on secp256k1.

repos.name: range-proof
repos.description: Pedersen commitment range proofs on secp256k1.

repos.name: shamir-core
repos.description: Core Shamir's Secret Sharing implementation over GF(256).

repos.name: shamir-words
repos.description: Split secrets into human-readable BIP-39 word shares.

categories.name: Compliance
categories.description: Jurisdiction intelligence and professional registry tooling for global compliance.

repos.name: jurisdiction-kit
repos.description: Professional body registries and jurisdiction intelligence for 30+ countries.

categories.name: Protocol / Standards

repos.description: 30 Nostr protocol extensions covering service coordination, trust, payments, disputes, key hierarchy, and encrypted access.
